description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding shelving unit with a white painted frame and natural wood shelves and back panel. The front features two open compartments, each divided by a central vertical support and a single horizontal shelf, creating four storage spaces. The sides are solid and painted white, with subtle panel detailing. The back is constructed from vertical wooden planks, giving a rustic yet clean appearance. The top surface is flat and wide, suitable for placing additional items. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the interior is open and accessible from the front.
description: A white, rectangular open shelving unit with natural wood shelves and back panel, featuring four compartments and a flat top.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open compartments divided into four sections by a central vertical and horizontal shelf, with visible wood grain on the shelves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid white painted panel with subtle rectangular detailing, no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a back panel made of vertical natural wood planks, with visible wood grain and no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing a solid white painted panel with subtle detailing.
